signal.technical_translation: This paper proposes a novel analog compute architecture using HZO ferroelectric capacitors to accelerate transformer-based language models. The FCDC device stores analog state nonvolatilely and performs charge-domain vector-matrix multiplication (VMM) for attention operations. The work evaluates two deployment modes: a full-substrate mode that runs all transformer layers on the FCDC and a KV-coprocessor mode that only stores keys and values. The results show minimal impact on model perplexity and downstream accuracy, with significant energy savings in specific workloads like RAG and agent loops. The energy benefit comes from nonvolatility, no refresh, and long KV-cache residency.

signal.technical_translation: This paper introduces a new algebraic framework for analyzing and engineering automorphisms in Generalized Bicycle (GB) codes, which are a type of cyclic quantum code.
